SlimeWire Telegram raid bot with buy tracker

Launch groups often want the raid post and buy tracker in the same place. SlimeWire's group tooling can position those workflows side by side with scans, proof, and web terminal links.

Open SlimeWireOpen @SlimeWiredBot

What this search usually means

Raid plus buys

Connect social activity with visible buy context instead of splitting attention across bots.

Token scan cards

A pasted CA can route into token context, chart links, and risk notes.

Launch proof

Proof pages and receipts help communities revisit what happened.

Telegram flow

The group stays inside Telegram until deeper chart or wallet review is needed.

Admin toggles

Use only the modules the room needs.

Clean handoff

SlimeWire links guide users to the terminal, not a dead-end post.

Related SlimeWire pages

Telegram Raid Buy Bot · Pump Fun Launch Platform · Launch On Slimewire Guide · Telegram Raid Bot · Resources · Solana Telegram Bot

FAQ

Can one Telegram bot handle raid posts and buy tracking?

Yes, SlimeWire documents both workflows as modules around @SlimeWiredBot.

Why combine raid and buy tracking?

It keeps launch attention, buy context, token scans, and proof links connected in one group flow.

Can this be used for Solana launches?

Yes. SlimeWire is focused on Solana memecoin and launch workflows.

Does this make a launch safe?

No. It improves visibility and workflow organization, not market certainty.
